task: OpenClaw Discord smartfarm pump confirmation timeout and unsafe shell path

governance_bootstrap.summary: Confirmed real verification, scoped changes, cross-model review, deployment, and exact closeout requirements.
Confirmed completion requires production-facing evidence and must not rely on mock-only verification.

verification.name: local plugin routing and actuator safety regression
verification.result: PASS: ambiguous ON/OFF asks once, same-sender follow-up binds to the native tool, cross-user confirmation fails closed, raw shell pump calls are blocked, and model parameters are overwritten.

verification.name: local MQTT safety and bridge regression
verification.result: PASS: 53 tests, including ON fail-closed, exact QoS 1 PUBACK, three-attempt OFF retry, and explicit unverified physical state.

verification.name: local real process fail-closed ON check
verification.result: PASS: exited 2 immediately with on_blocked_until_independent_hardware_watchdog_is_verified and performed no broker I/O.

deploy.result: Pending production deployment and live OpenClaw two-turn verification.
